description_long: A small cluster of mushrooms is arranged on a flat olive-green surface, each with a rounded, dome-shaped cap that is a deep reddish-brown color. The caps have a smooth, slightly glossy finish and appear to be firm, with subtle variations in size and shape among the group. The stems are short and thick, blending into the caps, and are only partially visible from certain angles. The mushrooms are closely grouped, suggesting they may have grown together or been placed intentionally. No gills are visible beneath the caps, and the overall appearance is natural and organic. The setting is minimal, with the mushrooms as the focal point against a plain, curved backdrop.
description: A cluster of reddish-brown, dome-capped mushrooms with smooth, glossy surfaces sits on an olive-green background. The mushrooms are closely grouped, with short, thick stems and no visible gills.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cluster of mushrooms with rounded, reddish-brown caps and some stems partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the height and thickness of the mushrooms, with caps appearing more stacked and stems less visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view shows the arrangement and grouping of the caps, with little detail of stems or gills.
description_view_3: Rear side view displays the backs of the caps and the close grouping, with minimal stem visibility.
